creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
With Linuxulator enabled and port emulators/linux-base_f10-10_3 installed, the port print/acroread9 opens a window for a very short time and then stops working and closing window by throwing the following error:

terminate called after throwing an instance of 'RSException'

This happens on all boxes with FreeBSD 9.0-CUR/amd64 and FreeBSD 8.2-PRE/amd64.

Fix: 

Install print/acroread8 instead.
How-To-Repeat: Install print/acroread9 on FreeBSD 9/amd64, FreeBSD 8.2/amd64 with emulators/linux-base_f10-10_3  and try to start.
